title: Friendly Fire Denial
description: Prevents friendly fire/miss-click between allies / living entities.
body:
# FriendlyFireDenial

**Version:** 1.0.0

---
![FFD Demo](https://i.imgur.com/HhBPxmX.gif)

## 1.1 Changelog :

- GUI improvements : 
- Added "Clear All" button (clears the selected list only)
- Added enable/disable toggle widget
- Lists are now scrollable with the mouse
- ModMenu integration

## 🔥 Description

Friendly Fire Denial is a lightweight Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.6 that prevents accidental friendly fire by blocking damage dealt to your friends and entities. Keep your team safe and enjoy cooperative gameplay without worries!

---

## ✨ Features

- Blocks damage dealt to allies, preventing friendly fire.
- Fully client-side mod.
- Simple setup with Fabric Loader and Fabric API.
- Languages: Russian, English

---

## ⚙️ Installation

1. Ensure you have [Fabric Loader (v0.15.9+)](https://fabricmc.net/use/) installed.
2. Install the corresponding [Fabric API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api) for Minecraft 1.21.6.
3. Download the `FriendlyFireDenial` mod `.jar` file.
4. Place the mod `.jar` into your Minecraft `mods` folder.
5. Launch Minecraft with the Fabric profile.

---
